name: Vegetarian Chef Salad- Vegetarian Cooking Fo
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Whole Wheat bread, toasted and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the basic free salad with cheeses and garbanzo beans.
2. Top with the whole wheat bread cubes.
3. Serve 1 serving of meat alternative, 2 servings of fat, and 1 serving of bread.
